_note: Virginia Tech men's basketball, 1994-2026. Per-season per-game lines (pts/reb/ast/stl/blk). 1994-2024 sourced from Sports-Reference (primarily individual player pages cbb/players/<slug>.html; a few low-usage bench rows cite the SR season page pending rate-limit clearing). 2023-26 recent players from ESPN's keyless API (site.api roster + sports.core.api per-athlete season averages). ESPN-first for recent seasons, SR/Wikipedia fallback for older ones. Honors (All-ACC/All-American/POY/All-Freshman, and pre-2005 All-Big East/Atlantic 10/Metro) verified via Wikipedia, hokiesports.com ACC-era awards, and official ACC releases. See docs/DATA-SOURCING.md.
